title: Gluten-Free Crispy Cornmeal Bites
description: A crunchy, gluten-free snack made with cornmeal and crisps. Easy to make and perfect for a quick bite.
instructions: 2. In a bowl, mix together the cornmeal and crushed crisps.
3. Add the melted with (butter or oil) and mix until the mixture is well combined.
5. Use a spoon to drop small balls of the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the bites are crispy and golden brown.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
